---
title: "The R Installation Manager"
toc: false
---

::::: {.hero}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column .hero-intro width="62%"}
{{< include _partials/intro.md >}}
:::

::: {.column .hero-gap width="3%"}
:::

::: {.column .hero-install width="35%"}

::: {.install-cta}
Latest version [**{{< var version >}}**](news.qmd){.install-version}

```{=html}
<a id="install-cta-button" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" href="install.html">Install rig</a>
<p class="install-cta-links">
  or view install instructions for
  <a href="install.html#macos">macOS</a>,
  <a href="install.html#windows">Windows</a> or
  <a href="install.html#linux">Linux</a>.
</p>
<script>
(function () {
  function detectOS() {
    var p = (((navigator.userAgentData && navigator.userAgentData.platform) || navigator.platform || "")).toLowerCase();
    var ua = (navigator.userAgent || "").toLowerCase();
    if (p.indexOf("mac") > -1 || ua.indexOf("mac") > -1) return "macOS";
    if (p.indexOf("win") > -1 || ua.indexOf("win") > -1) return "Windows";
    if (p.indexOf("linux") > -1 || p.indexOf("x11") > -1 || ua.indexOf("linux") > -1) return "Linux";
    return null;
  }
  var os = detectOS();
  var btn = document.getElementById("install-cta-button");
  if (btn && os) {
    btn.textContent = "Install rig for " + os;
    btn.setAttribute("href", "install.html#" + os.toLowerCase());
  }
})();
</script>
```
:::

:::

::::

:::::

## Quick start

Once rig is installed:

```sh
rig add release      # install the latest R release
rig list             # list installed R versions
rig default 4.5.1    # set the default R version
```

## Features

{{< include _partials/features.md >}}

## Known issues

{{< include _partials/known-issues.md >}}
